## Commercial usage

NA-AI Landing is a paid template with commercial usage rights depending on the license included with your purchase.

The template is designed for personal projects, commercial projects, client work, product landing pages, agency delivery, and SaaS or AI marketing pages.

<Callout title="Core idea">
  You can use the template to build and ship projects. You cannot resell, redistribute, or publish the source code as a competing template.
</Callout>

## Common license scope

Always review the `LICENSE` file included in your purchased package.

Common license terms may include:

- single project license
- multi-project license
- extended/commercial license

The governing terms are the license included in your delivered ZIP and the legal pages on PyColors.

## Allowed vs not allowed

<PreferAvoid
  preferTitle="Generally allowed"
  avoidTitle="Not allowed"
  prefer={[
    'use in a personal project',
    'use in a commercial project',
    'use for client work',

    'deploy the finished website',
    'connect your own backend or services',

    'removing license restrictions',
  ]}
/>

## What the license does not include

The template does not include backend implementation, authentication, database, Stripe payments, CMS integration, email delivery, custom implementation work, or guaranteed third-party service configuration.

If you need auth, billing, protected routes, and backend-ready foundations, review Starter Pro.

<Callout type="info" title="Product boundary">
  NA-AI Landing is the frontend marketing layer. It is not a full SaaS application.
</Callout>

## Support

For support, use the official support channel provided after purchase.

Support generally focuses on accessing the purchased package, installation and setup questions, template usage clarification, documentation clarification, and issues related to the delivered source code.

Support does not generally include building your custom backend, rewriting the design for your brand, integrating third-party services for you, creating custom features, or debugging unrelated infrastructure.

## Versioning policy

NA-AI Landing follows Semantic Versioning.

| Version | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| Patch `1.0.x` | Bug fixes, visual polish, minor improvements |
| Minor `1.x.0` | New sections, components, or backward-compatible features |
| Major `x.0.0` | Breaking changes affecting structure, APIs, or configuration |

## Common questions

<Accordions type="single">
  <Accordion title="Can I use NA-AI Landing for client work?">Yes, if your license allows commercial and client usage. Review the LICENSE file included after purchase.</Accordion>
  <Accordion title="Can I resell the template after modifying it?">No. You cannot resell, redistribute, sublicense, or publish the source code as a competing template.</Accordion>
  <Accordion title="Can I connect it to my backend?">Yes. You can connect the frontend to your own backend, CMS, analytics, form provider, or payment flow.</Accordion>
  <Accordion title="Does the template include Stripe payments?">No. NA-AI Landing is frontend-only. Use Starter Pro if you need billing foundations.</Accordion>
</Accordions>

<Callout title="Ship the project, not the source as a product.">
  The license is designed to let you build real projects while protecting the template from redistribution.
</Callout>
